chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-1547 of 2023 (Mir Hassan Lashari Vs. Province of Sindh & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For Orders on CMA No. 6533/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case. 15-02-2024. Mr. Rehmat Ali @ Raza Ali Shaikh, advocate for the petitioner. ******** 1. Over ruled. 2. Granted. 3. It is stated by the petitioner that the respondents are found reluctant to restore his electric supply; therefore, their action to be declared illegal with a direction to restore the electric supply to his house forthwith and not to disconnect the same in future by issuing false and illegal detection bills. SEPCO being Company, without statutory rules is supplying the electricity to its customers on payment of consumption of electricity, if such supply to the petitioner is disconnected then possibly it may be on account of his default in payment of bill towards consumption; therefore, such issue involving factual controversy could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction by way of instant petition; same being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with listed applications. Judge Judge Nasim/P.A
